body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: A summary of security-enabling technologies for IoT devices
The Need for New Authentication Methods for Internet of Things
Defined-Trust Transport (DeftT) Protocol for Limited Domains

The need for new authentication methods for IoT
